skills.name: Ei, Ei, Mun!
skills.description: Increase velocity, very slightly increase acceleration, and slightly recover endurance after passing another runner late-race. (Long)
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Long・If you overtake someone during the Final Leg, your speed will increase, your acceleration will slightly increase, and you stamina will slightly recover
skills.japaneseDescription: レース終盤で追い抜くと速度が上がり加速力がちょっと上がり持久力をわずかに回復する＜長距離＞

skills.name: WILD, Amirite?
skills.description: Increase velocity for a medium duration when another runner is right behind the skill user for a long time.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: If someone has been following you for at least three seconds, your speed will increase
skills.japaneseDescription: すぐ後ろにウマ娘が長くいるとしばらくの間速度が上がる

skills.name: Breakaway on Lock
skills.description: Increase velocity for a medium duration when leading by a fair margin mid-race. (Long)
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Long・At a random point during the Middle Leg, if you're in the first place with a clear lead, your speed will increase
skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤に差をつけ先頭だとしばらくの間速度が上がる＜長距離＞

skills.name: Indestructable
skills.description: Recover endurance and slightly increase velocity when positioned midpack or further back upon approaching mid-race. (Late Surger)
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Betweener・During the second half of the Opening Leg, if you're not in the front, your speed will slightly increase and your stamina recover
skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤が迫ったとき中団以降にいると持久力を回復し速度がわずかに上がる＜作戦・差し＞

skills.name: Rondo to the Right
skills.description: Improve performance on right-handed tracks, greatly increasing Speed and Power.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Your Speed and Power stats are increased by 80 on clockwise tracks
skills.japaneseDescription: 右回りコースが得意になりスピードとパワーがすごく上昇する

skills.name: Get the Festival Going!
skills.description: Greatly increase acceleration in the start dash. (Front Runner)
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Runner・At the start of the race, your acceleration will greatly increase
skills.japaneseDescription: スタート時に加速力がすごく上がる＜作戦・逃げ＞

skills.name: Bright Blast
skills.description: Greatly increase velocity on a straight. (Long)
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Long・At a random point on a random straight, your speed will greatly increase
skills.japaneseDescription: 直線で速度がすごく上がる＜長距離＞

skills.name: Good Year for Sakura!
skills.description: Increase velocity for a medium duration when positioned toward the front on the final corner. (Pace Chaser)
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Leader・If you're in the first half of the pack during the Final Corner, your speed will increase
skills.japaneseDescription: 最終コーナーで前の方にいるとしばらくの間速度が上がる＜作戦・先行＞

skills.name: The Sakura Bloom Regally Today
skills.description: Increase performance in spring, greatly increasing Speed and Power.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Your Speed and Power stats are increased by 80 in spring races
skills.japaneseDescription: 春のレースが得意になりスピードとパワーがすごく上昇する

skills.name: Eternal Light
skills.description: Recover endurance and slightly increase velocity when positioned toward the front mid-race. (Pace Chaser)
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Leader・If you're in the first half of the pack at a random point during the Middle Leg, your speed will increase and your stamina recover
skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤に前の方にいると持久力を回復し、速度がわずかに上がる＜作戦・先行＞

skills.name: Give This Moment Everything
skills.description: Greatly increase velocity when well-positioned on a straight in the last spurt. (Medium)
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Medium・If you are in a good position on the Final Straight during the Final Leg, your speed will greatly increase
skills.japaneseDescription: 終盤以降の最終直線で好位置にいると速度がすごく上がる＜中距離＞

skills.name: Growing Flame
skills.description: Increase velocity for a medium duration after passing another runner mid-race.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: If you overtake someone during the Middle Leg, your speed will increase
skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤に追い抜くとしばらくの間速度が上がる

skills.name: Yaeno's Fighting Spirit
skills.description: Greatly increase velocity and very slightly increase acceleration when pressured on the final corner or later. (Medium)
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Medium・During the final corner, if someone is trying to overtake you, your speed and acceleration will increase
skills.japaneseDescription: 最終コーナー以降に詰め寄られると速度がすごく上がり加速力がちょっと上がる＜中距離＞

skills.name: Ladylike Resolve
skills.description: Greatly recover endurance when passed mid-race.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: If you're overtaken during the Middle Leg, your stamina will recover greatly
skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤に追い抜かれると持久力をすごく回復する

skills.name: Immovable as a Mountain
skills.japaneseName: 動かざること羊蹄山の若し
skills.description: Slightly decrease velocity and massively recover endurance when positioned midpack in the early part of mid-race. (Long)
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Long・During the first half of the Middle Leg, if you're between the top 40% and 80% of the pack, your speed will decrease but your stamina will recover tremendously
skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤始めの方に中団にいると速度をわずかに落として持久力をものすごく回復する＜長距離＞
